---
title: "References"
subtitle: "Bibliography of studies included in the compiled dataset of genetic paternity in wild nonhuman primates"
date: ""
output:
  pdf_document:
    latex_engine: xelatex
header-includes:
  - \usepackage{titling}
  - \renewcommand{\maketitle}{\begin{center}{\LARGE\bfseries\thetitle\par}\vskip 0.5em{\large Bibliography of studies included in the compiled dataset\\ of genetic paternity in wild nonhuman primates\par}\end{center}\vskip 2em}
  - \usepackage{fancyhdr}
  - \fancypagestyle{firstpage}{\fancyhf{}\renewcommand{\headrulewidth}{0pt}\fancyfoot[L]{\small Document rendered on \today}}
  - \AtBeginDocument{\thispagestyle{firstpage}}
bibliography: paternity-table-sources.bib
csl: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/citation-style-language/styles/master/apa.csl
nocite: '@*'
---

**All materials for this project can be accessed at <https://github.com/slrosen/primate-paternity-metanalysis>.**
